message:
feat(ffs-cli): add scrub subcommand for read-only integrity scanning (bd-m35)

Adds `ffs scrub <image> [--json]` that detects the filesystem type, creates
a block device, and runs the ffs-repair scrub pipeline. Reports findings in
human-readable or JSON format. Exits with status 2 if Error-level or above
corruption is detected.

Currently uses ZeroCheckValidator as a baseline; format-specific validators
(ext4 metadata_csum, btrfs csum) will be plugged in as implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
